chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1215 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 26.01.2026 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Complainant present, holding CNIC No. 45206-2260756-9, extends his no objection contending that the injured has also given his affidavit of compromise, which has been filed before the learned trial Court. Learned Counsel for the applicant requires confirmation of order dated 18.12.2025. Learned DPG, on account of compoundable sections being available, does not oppose the bail application. Accordingly, order dated 18.12.2025, whereby the applicant was granted interim pre-arrest bail, stands confirmed. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
